debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
S : List (Call m)
hyp :
  ¬∀ c ∈ S,
      isAgentInitialCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall m S c.2 c = true ∨
        ¬(isAgentInitialCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentInitialCall m S c.2 c = true)
⊢ False

proof:
have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hyp this
failed_attempts:
push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact (hc (em _)).elim

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (em _)
exact Classical.em (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)
exact em ((isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c))

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, h⟩
    exact h (by exact em _)
exact Classical.em (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c)

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (by exact em _)
exact em ((isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c))
successful_attempts:
have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentInitialCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentInitialCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hyp this
